title: charness usage episode record
description: Single privacy-bounded product usage episode for H-LAM/T analysis. Records are JSON objects, normally one per line in <storage_path>/usage_episode.jsonl.

episode_id.description: Opaque product-owned id. Must not embed user identity, raw prompt, transcript, or source body.

context_bucket.description: Privacy-safe product-owned context bucket such as slack_thread or github_issue.

context_ref.description: Optional privacy-safe stable reference for recognizing repeated use in the same product context without carrying raw source or user identity.

entry_point.description: Product-owned entry point bucket such as mention, command, ui, scheduled, delegated, or api.

trigger_type.description: Product-owned trigger bucket such as explicit_request, correction, failure, review_request, or follow_up.

selected_job.description: Privacy-safe human/job intent bucket, not a raw user prompt.

surface.description: The LAM surface that acted, such as slack_reply, github_issue_create, tool_call, or product_workflow.

capability_ref.description: Optional product-owned capability or integration reference.

feedback_signal.description: Optional product-owned feedback bucket such as accepted, edited, ignored, retried, follow_up_requested, or human_confirmed.

ref.description: Opaque product-owned identifier or locator. Must not embed source body, prompt text, transcript excerpts, author identity, or raw user identity.

path.description: Optional repo-root-relative path when the reference points into a repo artifact.
